description.value:
• You gain 30 feet of Darkvision and Tremorsense.
  • You increase your maximum hit points or chakra points by your proficiency bonus (Pick one). At 11th level you boost the other resource you did not choose at 3rd level as well.

  • You gain a special pool of dice known as Calamity Die, which are d8s. You gain a maximum number of Calamity Die equal to your Constitution modifier. You regain half of your spent dice on a short rest, and all on a long rest. You can use these dice for the following, once per turn.

    • Beyond Strength: When you make a Strength or Constitution skill check or saving throw, you can add up to 1 Calamity Die to the result.
    • Calamitous Defense: When you would reduce damage or gain temporary hit points, you can spend any number of Calamity Die, adding twice the result to the damage reduced or as temporary hit points.
    • Dominant Force: When a creature would make a saving throw against you, you can reduce their result by half the result of 1 Calamity Die (Min. 1).
    • Peerless Power: When you would roll to maintain concentration, you add up to 2 Calamity Die.
  • At 11th level, you would roll for initative and have no Calamity Die remaining, you may spend 1 Chakra Die to regain half of your maximum Calamity Die, rounded up.
